rules.name: Security or privacy
rules.instructions: Do not diagnose, disclose sensitive information, or promise remediation. Create an escalation task with minimal necessary context.

rules.name: Billing, refunds, or account access
rules.instructions: Do not issue refunds, credits, account changes, or access changes without owner review.

rules.name: Bug or incident
rules.instructions: Create a bug or incident handoff with reproduction details, impact, timestamps, and customer-visible symptoms.

rules.name: Angry or VIP customer
rules.instructions: Draft empathetically, avoid defensive language, and get human review before sending.
